package rulecoverage

func NegativeDomainErrorsDeclaredInHandlerPackage() string {
    ruleID := "domain_errors_declared_in_handler_package"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Business error types declared only in handlers instead of a reusable domain or service boundary."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
